tools.name: get_service_catalog
tools.description: Returns the full machine-readable service catalog including available services, pricing, and payment methods. Use this to understand what Archangel Agency offers to AI agents.

tools.name: get_universal_language_briefing
tools.description: Returns the Universal Language research briefing — structured content about the formally derivable geometric pattern language. Useful for answering questions about UL, AI alignment through ontological context, or UQPL.

tools.name: get_context_jsons
tools.description: Returns the directory of Context JSON briefing documents — structured ontological frameworks built on Universal Language primitives, designed for AI consumption. Use 'list' to see available contexts, or specify a context name to fetch it directly.

tools.name: get_agent_info
tools.description: Returns the A2A agent card with skills, capabilities, payment methods, and contact info for Jono Tho'ra / Archangel Agency.

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "get_context_jsons" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.
